# ShhChats

> Late night anonymous chat for the curious mind. Connect instantly with real people when you can't sleep — free, private, judgment-free.

ShhChats is an anonymous chat app for late-night conversations. Users sign up with a display name, age, and location, then get matched with other awake users in real time. No phone number, no email verification, no data selling.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page describing the service and how matching works.
- [Safety](/safety): Community guidelines, reporting flow, and how we keep ShhChats safe.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy — what we collect, how we use it, retention, and user rights.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the ShhChats team.
